series_metadata.series_description: consist of complaint form and supporting documents, notification letters, referral letters, subpoenas, and any and all documents necessary to establish the scope and completeness of the investigation. Investigation files may also contain confidential information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after case is closed then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after case is closed then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
